variables.notes: No explicit total current assets line appears on the Balance Sheet. This insurer-style IFRS statement is not presented in current/non-current format.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash-flow beginning/end balances.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of reporting period
candidates.why: Cash-flow ending balance matches the balance-sheet cash line, but balance-sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of reporting period
candidates.why: Cash balance but beginning-of-period, so not preferred for balance-sheet CHE.

variables.notes: No explicit total current liabilities line appears on the Balance Sheet. The statement is not classified into current/non-current liabilities.

There are borrowing-related rows such as 'Other interest bearing liabilities' and 'Loans from financial institutions', but none is explicitly identified as current/short-term, and lease rows must be excluded. Short-term debt may exist but cannot be identified confidently from the provided row labels without risking misclassification.
Selected outside shortlist. 'Tax liabilities' is the best balance-sheet match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities, especially since 'Deferred tax liabilities' is presented separately.

candidates.why: Exact total PPE line on the Balance Sheet; best match for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Gross
candidates.why: Tangible fixed assets but lease-related gross component, not preferred over total PPE.
Exact total assets line on the Balance Sheet.
Exact operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities line.
